{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353357903498593078","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格很独特，文笔简洁而有力，让人在阅读时感到紧张和刺激。里面的故事都很吸引人，我特别喜欢那个关于鬼手的故事，情节跌宕起伏，让人毛骨悚然。而且作者对恐怖氛围的营造非常到位，让我感觉就像身临其境一样。总的来说，这是一本很精彩的恐怖小说，推荐给喜欢恐怖故事的朋友们。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709522526,"group_id":"7316457029457955902","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8Ow6HYP4eF8NUBec+QC7b7327SR/1Ayk7kXEfEToBU/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3705825637439850","user_name":"永阳的杜昂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3705825637439850","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316457029457955902","book_info":{"abstract":"午夜时分，恐怖的气氛当中，惊奇鬼故事，开始上演！
